title: arenaria tenuifolia var. hybrida
intro: Arenaria tenuifolia var. hybrida, also known as the sandwort or sea-spurry, is a plant species that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in the management of kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and even certain types of skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Arenaria tenuifolia var. hybrida is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
